name: truenas-manager
description: Full TrueNAS management — storage pools, datasets, snapshots, SMB/NFS/iSCSI shares, services, VMs, apps, and users via the TrueNAS REST API

TRUENAS_API_KEY.description: Your TrueNAS API key — generate one at TrueNAS UI → top-right user menu → API Keys

TRUENAS_VERIFY_SSL.description: Set to 'true' to verify SSL certificates (default: false for self-signed certs)
